meaning: n.棒,柱,杆,竿,极,磁极,电极vt.用竿支撑,用棒推vi.撑篙 Pole 波兰人
examples: The truck crashed into a telegraph pole.
Five members of Scott's expedition made it to the South Pole.
When Scott reached the South Pole he found that Amundsen had anticipated him.
Dennison added a centimetre to the seven-year-old pole vault record of Janine Whitlock with 4.45m.
Clark started on pole and was leading until a puncture forced him into the pits.
